LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS COMPLAINANT MUNROE SPIVOCK'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. CROSS DEFENDANTS UNIVERSE LLC, MUNROE SPIVOCK AND VISIT TAVEETHAMCHAROEN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE NINTH CAUSE OF ACTION, WHICH CROSS-COMPLAINANT HAS AGREED TO WITHDRAW. OVERRULED ON ALL OTHER GROUNDS. CROSS-COMPLAINANT HAS STATED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO MAINTAIN A CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST CROSS-DEFENDANT VISIT TAVEETHAMCHAROEN ON AN ALTER EGO THEORY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The Order to Show Cause is ordered off calendar and dissolved. Dismissal on file. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-18-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-06-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Valerie S. Higgins, Esq. of Casas Riley & Simonian LLP, Tel. 650.948.7200, for cross-defendants and moving party;
Jacob M. Barlev, Esq. of David M. Steinberg & Associates, Tel. 925.946.1400, for cross-complainants and opposing party, via court call.

The matter was argued. RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANTS UNIVERSE LLC, MUNROE SPIVOCK and VISIT TAVEETHAMCHAROEN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is Sustained without leave to amend as to the ninth cause of action, which Cross-Complainant has agreed to withdraw. Overruled on all other grounds. Cross-Complainant has stated sufficient facts to maintain a cause of action against Cross-Defendant Visit Taveethamcharoen on an alter ego theory. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Amended X-Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The tentative ruling is adopted. CROSS COMPLAINANT MUNROE SPIVOCK's Motion For Leave To File Amended Cross-Complaint is Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-31-2012 Continued To Apr-22-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION And Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Valerie S. Higgins, Esq. of Casas Riley & Simonian, Tel. 650.948.7200, for Cross Complainant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling. CROSS COMPLAINANT LAURENT LEGENDRE's MOTION For Leave To File First Amended Cross-Complaint is Granted. In light of the pending trial date, the trial is continued to April 22, 2013 and discovery is re-opened. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
